  <h1 align="center">RECAP 2025</h1>
  <h3 align="center"> Interactive 3D Node Graph & Media Dashboard </h3>
</div>

<div align="center">
  <p>
    <i> An interactive 3D node graph and media dashboard highlighting BETO 888 milestones, travels, and Datacore components developed throughout 2025. </i>
  </p>
  <hr style="width:30%;">
</div>

Welcome to **RECAP 2025**, an immersive data-driven visualization component for Obsidian. Designed to showcase yearly development milestones, travels, and releases, it combines a responsive canvas node graph with dynamic media preview panels to bring milestone journals to life.

---

## ✨ Features

### 🌌 Interactive 3D Node Graph
*   🎮 **Fluid Orbit Controls**: Spin, scroll, and drag the interactive 3D ring configurations representing different years and months.
*   🧬 **Procedural Node Connections**: Custom mathematical layout that renders active developer milestones as floating orbital nodes with responsive connecting fibers.
*   🌗 **Theme Synchronization**: Pulls color tokens and accent values dynamically from the host Obsidian theme to match default or community layouts.

### 🎬 Media Dashboard & Auto-Play
*   🖥️ **Cinematic Presentation**: An elegant, high-impact viewport that displays development recordings and website summaries.
*   🔄 **Interactive Slider**: Seamless carousel for months featuring multiple milestones or media items.
*   🤖 **Hands-Free Playback**: Turn on auto-play to automatically transition through yearly achievements cinematic-style.

### 💬 Tactical Feedback & Reactive UI
*   💬 **Community Overlays**: Real-time styling of Discord and Reddit comments aligned with specific releases.
*   🔥 **Emoji Reactions**: Micro-animations and HUD elements mapping actual milestone sentiment.

---

## 📦 Directory Index & Components

The package exposes the following compiled files:

| File | Description |
| :--- | :--- |
| **[`RECAP 2025.md`](RECAP%202025.md)** | The main entry point note designed to be opened in Obsidian. |
| **[`src/index.jsx`](src/index.jsx)** | Safe bootstrapper component implementing dynamic status bar and scrollbar suppression styles. |
| **[`src/App.jsx`](src/App.jsx)** | Main coordinator and data-parser logic that maps the markdown record to interactive structures. |
| **[`src/components/NodeGraph.jsx`](src/components/NodeGraph.jsx)** | Custom canvas-based orbital engine rendering 3D milestones and orbits. |
| **[`data/recap.md`](data/recap.md)** | The milestone database containing structured markdown journals and media links. |
| **[`assets/`](assets/)** | Local video and image assets referenced by the node graph. |
| **[`METADATA.md`](METADATA.md)** | Packaging manifest outlining taxonomy, complexity, target, and security configurations. |
| **[`CONTRIBUTION.md`](CONTRIBUTION.md)** | Contributor architecture standards and local compilation guidelines. |
| **[`LICENSE.md`](LICENSE.md)** | MIT open-source license. |
